tluaLocalFunctionResolution.tlua(9,16): error TLUA6133: 'recursiveOnly' is declared but its value is never read.
tluaLocalFunctionResolution.tlua(16,1): error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'beforeLocal'.


==== tluaLocalFunctionResolution.tlua (2 errors) ====
    local function factorial(n: number): number
      if n <= 1 then
        return 1;
      end
      return n * factorial(n - 1);
    end
    factorial(3);
    
    local function recursiveOnly(n: number): number
                   ~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA6133: 'recursiveOnly' is declared but its value is never read.
      if n <= 0 then
        return 0;
      end
      return recursiveOnly(n - 1);
    end
    
    beforeLocal();
    ~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'beforeLocal'.
    local function beforeLocal(): void
    end
    beforeLocal();
    
    local function mutable(): number
      return 1;
    end
    mutable = function(): number
      return 2;
    end;
    mutable();
    
    local function shadow(): number
      return 1;
    end
    shadow();
    
    do
      local function shadow(): number
        return 2;
      end
      shadow();
    end
    
    shadow();
